creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Dima Panov from comment #47)

Ah, I've forgot to mention.
The first attempt to update Qt5 to 5.15.8 was by building them with poudriere, install them by copying built packages to /usr/ports/packages/All/ and actually updating with `pkg_replace -a -PP`, which forces to use pre-built packages.

As problem happenes AFTER that, reopened and reported at comment 9.
After that, I've let pkg_replace to handle both forced-rebuild and reinstall.
